nasb.text: “A single witness shall not rise up against a man on account of any iniquity or any sin which he has committed; on the evidence of two or three witnesses a matter shall be confirmed.

esv.text: “A single witness shall not suffice against a person for any crime or for any wrong in connection with any offense that he has committed. Only on the evidence of two witnesses or of three witnesses shall a charge be established.

cnv.text: “人無論有甚麼過錯，或是犯了甚麼罪惡，不可憑著一個見證人的指證，總要憑著兩個見證人的口供，或是三個見證人的口供，才可以確定。

ccb.text: “如果人犯了什么罪或有什么过失，不可凭一个证人作证就定罪，要有两三个证人才可以定案。
